message:
fix(fcp-host): preserve cached data in not-modified responses and fix requires_confirmation

DiscoveryResponse::not_modified and IntrospectionResponse::not_modified
now accept the full cached payload (connectors, tools, rate_limits,
introspection) instead of returning empty vectors. This ensures 304
responses still carry the cached data for consumers that don't maintain
their own cache.

Fix requires_confirmation on ToolDescriptor: was unconditionally true
when any approval mode was set, now only true for Policy, Interactive,
and ElevationToken modes (not None/Implicit).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
